reasoning: The control IA-5(13) focuses on the expiration of cached authenticators, which is primarily related to password policies and authenticator management in IAM systems. Kubernetes does not manage user passwords directly; instead, it relies on external identity providers for authentication. Therefore, this control is not applicable to Kubernetes as Kubernetes itself does not handle password expiration or caching of authenticators. This is typically managed by external systems like LDAP, OIDC, or cloud IAM services.
title: Authenticator Management - Authenticator management | expiration of cached authenticators prohibit the use
